title: Mother fucking Care Bear adventures 💩 YTP
description:
Once Braveheart gets addicted to crack and dope, the rest of the Care Bear family quickly become addicts theirselves.

For this poop, I attempted to approach the creative process with a differnt directorial perspective. I hope to have created a poop which feels less like a traditional Electric Cheese poop, and more like the crazy shit you see in the Youtube Poop community today.
